Home.title: Macau Tutoring Marketplace MVP Roadmap
Home.subtitle: Your PDF is converted into an actionable plan. This repo now has project bootstrap + i18n + initial roadmap page.

phase0.title: Phase 0 - Validation & Setup
phase0.todo1: Interview 5 tutors and 5 parents for pain points
phase0.todo3: Set up Supabase, Vercel, and merchant accounts

phase2.title: Phase 2 - Tutor Onboarding
phase2.todo1: Build multi-step tutor profile with strict validation
phase2.todo2: Add tutor availability management with calendar
phase2.todo3: Launch public tutor profile with booking entry

phase3.title: Phase 3 - Search & Filters
phase3.todo1: Build filters for subject, grade, district, budget, mode
phase3.todo2: Support sort by match, price, rating, and reviews
phase3.todo3: Add comparison view for up to 3 tutors

phase4.title: Phase 4 - Transaction & Anti-Leakage
phase4.todo1: Redact contacts before payment and unlock after
phase4.todo2: Implement escrow, refund policy, recurring charge
phase4.todo3: Build weekly payout, dispute, and reporting workflow

phase5.title: Phase 5 - Trust & Reputation
phase5.todo1: Allow reviews only after completed on-platform sessions
phase5.todo2: Maintain rating average, review count, verification badge
phase5.todo3: Rank tutors by profile, rating, response, and verification

phase6.title: Phase 6 - Launch Preparation
phase6.todo1: Run end-to-end tests on mobile and bilingual flows
phase6.todo2: Fix P0/P1 bugs and complete landing page

phase7.title: Phase 7 - Public Launch
phase7.todo1: Start with soft launch and monitor transactions
phase7.todo2: Patch production issues and capture feedback
phase7.todo3: Run full launch and community marketing

phase8.title: Phase 8 - Monetization Ramp
phase8.todo1: Begin with 0% commission, then increase gradually
phase8.todo2: Introduce Pro/Elite subscriptions and sponsored listing
phase8.todo3: Expand matching service and institutional partnerships

Nav.brand: A* Marketplace · 星級頂尖教育平台

Auth.signInDesc: Existing users can directly access the dashboard.
Auth.signUpDesc: After signup you are signed in and taken to your dashboard. To switch to tutor or add name/phone, open “Account onboarding” from the footer or your dashboard.
Auth.signUpCheckEmail: Account created. Confirm the link in your email, then sign in to open your dashboard.
Auth.envMissing: Supabase is not configured. Please set NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in .env.local.
Auth.phoneLoginDesc: Enter your Macau phone number and we will send an SMS code.
Auth.otpHint: Tip: check your SMS and enter the code within 5 minutes.
Auth.brandSubtitle: Professional matching experience for both parents and tutors.
Auth.brandPoint1: Verified tutor profiles and transparent rates
Auth.brandPoint2: Fast bilingual booking flow on mobile
Auth.brandPoint3: Built for trust, clarity, and long-term growth

Onboarding.title: Complete account setup
Onboarding.subtitle: Select your role and contact details for booking workflows.
Onboarding.adminRoleNotAllowed: Administrator accounts cannot be created here. Only student and tutor roles are available for registration.
Onboarding.invalidRole: Please choose a valid role (student or tutor).
Onboarding.envMissing: Supabase is not configured yet. Please set up .env.local first.

Dashboard.tutorTodo1: Step 1: complete tutor profile and subjects
Dashboard.studentTodo1: Next: start tutor search and filters
Dashboard.studentTodo3: Next: leave a review after session
Dashboard.portfolioSectionBody: You can update education background, hourly rate, subjects, and bio anytime from the tutor profile setup page.
Dashboard.setupSuccess: Tutor profile saved. Verified badge will appear after admin approval.
Dashboard.readyToReviewEmpty: No accepted bookings available for review yet.
Dashboard.reviewSuccess: Thank you. Your review has been submitted.
Dashboard.bookingAcceptedToast: Booking accepted. Student has been notified.
Dashboard.bookingRejectedToast: Booking rejected. Student has been notified.
Dashboard.adminRejectReasonPlaceholder: Required rejection reason (e.g. blurry ID, mismatch, expired)

Reviews.title: Review tutor
Reviews.subtitle: Only students with an accepted booking from this exact tutor can submit a review.
Reviews.commentPlaceholder: Share your learning experience with this tutor...
Reviews.notEligible: You can only review bookings that were accepted by this tutor.
Reviews.alreadyReviewed: This booking already has a review.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.subtitle: Booking and message alerts stay here until you archive them.
Notifications.schemaHint: If this is the first time, run supabase/notifications-messages.sql in the SQL editor.

Messages.inboxSubtitle: Private threads with tutors or students you have contacted.
Messages.inboxEmpty: No conversations yet. Start from a tutor profile or after a booking.
Messages.threadSubtitle: Messages are private. Be careful sharing personal contact before platform rules allow it.
Messages.supportThreadSubtitle: This is an official support thread. Describe your issue directly here.
Messages.fromBookingBanner: Your booking was created. You can continue the conversation below — the tutor also received a booking alert.
Messages.missingPeer: This user profile is not ready for messaging yet.
Messages.supportManagerMissing: Support manager is not configured. Please set SUPPORT_MANAGER_USER_ID in environment variables.

TutorSetup.title: Tutor Multi-step Profile Setup
TutorSetup.subtitle: Complete all required fields. Verification documents are stored in a private table.
TutorSetup.step2Instruction: Set hourly rate and teaching period.
TutorSetup.step4Instruction: Fill education, experience, and profile photo.
TutorSetup.subject: Subject
TutorSetup.subjectGradesHint: Tap all subjects you teach in this row, then tap all levels/curricula (English names are saved for search).
TutorSetup.educationRowRule: Fill degree type, university, subject studied, and year period — or enter at least 5 characters in subject studied only (legacy short note).
TutorSetup.avatarExistingPhotoHint: Profile photo on file — choose a new image above to replace it.
TutorSetup.avatarHint: PNG/JPG/JPEG supported. Crop before upload to keep a consistent tutor-card display.
TutorSetup.avatarReplaceHint: To change your photo, choose a new file, crop it, and upload again — it will replace the current one.
TutorSetup.avatarPreviewEmpty: Your cropped preview will appear here
TutorSetup.avatarPickAndCrop: Please choose an image and crop it first.
TutorSetup.verificationPdfIntro: Upload a PDF: official transcript, university offer letter, or proof of study only.
TutorSetup.verificationPdfExistingHint: A verification file is on file — choose a new PDF above to replace it.
TutorSetup.verificationPdfAfterUploadLine: PDF uploaded; link saved to the form.
TutorSetup.verificationPdfReplaceHint: To replace your document, choose a new PDF and upload again.
TutorSetup.pickDocType: Please select a document type first.
TutorSetup.periodRule: Working period must be at least 1 month.
TutorSetup.submitBlockedFixEarlierSteps: Some required fields are invalid. We switched you to the step that needs fixing.
TutorSetup.uploadSuccessToast: Verification file uploaded and URL filled in
TutorSetup.summaryTitle: Summary so far (you can go back to edit)
TutorSetup.verificationSampleNote: Good examples: official transcript PDF (name + courses), offer letter, or enrolment letter. Avoid blurry scans, cover-only pages, or stitched screenshots.
TutorSetup.serviceAreasRegionRule: Please select subareas within the selected district.

TutorSubmitted.title: Submitted — pending review
TutorSubmitted.description: We will review your documents. After approval, your public profile can show a verified badge. You can manage availability from the dashboard or return to edit your profile.
TutorSubmitted.toastSaved: Saved successfully — your profile is now pending review.

Availability.title: Tutor Availability Management
Availability.subtitle: Green = weekly recurring availability; blue = one-off availability on a specific date; red = booked. After dragging, choose weekly vs one-time.
Availability.recurringDragHint: Drag on empty space in the week view, then pick Weekly or One-time in the dialog. You cannot drag over existing green/blue slots or booked (red) events. Click a colored block to delete.
Availability.cantDeleteBooked: Booked sessions cannot be removed here.
Availability.slotModeDescription: Weekly repeats every same weekday. One-time applies only on the date shown below.
Availability.invalidRangeHint: Drag within a single day (not across midnight into another day) and keep end after start.
Availability.slotsSummaryBody: You can delete here as well; same as clicking a block on the calendar.

Booking.title: Create Booking
Booking.subtitle: Only truly available slots are shown (booked and blocked slots are filtered out).
Booking.success: Booking created and waiting for payment.
Booking.noSlots: No available slots on this date. Please choose another date.
Booking.noSubject: This tutor has no configured subjects yet, booking unavailable.
Booking.studentsOnlyBookingNote: Only student accounts can book tutors. Registered tutor accounts cannot book other tutors.

TutorPublic.availabilityNote: Exact weekly slots are set by the tutor; use booking to pick a real available time.
TutorPublic.reviewPostedToast: Review submitted. Jumped to the latest public review section.

Landing.heroBody: Redefine the traditional tutoring communication model by letting parents connect directly with quality tutors, saving both time and money.
Landing.heroValue1: Strict verification: every tutor goes through identity and qualification checks
Landing.heroValue2: Full transparency: education, experience, and ratings at a glance
Landing.heroValue3: Self-service booking: choose the right tutor and send booking requests directly
Landing.heroIllustrationCaption: Clarity, trust, and a smoother booking flow for families and tutors.
Landing.developerPostP1: Please remember to come back to this website from time to time to check your booking status and any updates.
Landing.developerPostP2: We are also developing a mobile app to improve notifications — thank you for your patience.
Landing.leadSubtitle: Five core fields: grade, subject, district, budget cap, and phone. After submit we will explain the next steps.
Landing.leadNextSteps: We will contact you within ~24h by phone or WeChat to confirm schedule and preferences. You can still browse the directory anytime.
Landing.howParents1: Browse the directory and filter by subject, grade, district, and budget
Landing.howParents2: Compare profiles and ratings, then pick the best fit
Landing.howParents3: If you have any questions, you can always contact the Support Center
Landing.howTutors1: Complete your profile and upload verification documents
Landing.howTutors2: Set weekly availability and block unavailable dates
Landing.howTutors3: Receive booking requests and follow up
Landing.recentDemandsSubtitle: Anonymized (no phone or WeChat), newest first.
Landing.recentDemandsDemoNote: No live anonymized rows yet — showing sample cards. After you run `parent-lead-public-feed.sql` in Supabase and new leads arrive, this section switches to real anonymized demand.
Landing.faq1q: How are you different from MovaTutor?
Landing.faq1a: We offer searchable tutor listings and reviews, plus a more transparent booking flow. Escrow can be added later.
Landing.faq2a: No. Browsing and filtering are free. Payments will roll out in later milestones.
Landing.faq3a: Early MVP focuses on acquisition and matching. Pricing will be published before any charges go live.
Landing.why1Body: Zero platform commission and service fees forever. Browse tutor profiles for free, with no hidden charges for booking or matching.
Landing.why2Body: Filter by subject, grade, district, and budget in seconds—no long waits, find the right tutor fast.
Landing.why3Body: Every tutor goes through strict identity and qualification checks. Transparent profiles for peace of mind.
Landing.why4Body: Tutors set available slots in advance—book directly without endless back-and-forth, saving time for everyone.
Landing.ctaSectionTitle: Ready to find the right tutor?
Landing.ctaSectionBody: Start browsing now or create your account to manage bookings faster.
Landing.footerAboutBody: Macau Tutoring is a bilingual marketplace connecting families with trusted tutors.
Landing.footerSocialDisabled: Add social URLs in environment variables to enable links.
Landing.contactBody: These details are configured via environment variables (safe to commit defaults in .env.example).
Landing.assurance1Body: When escrow goes live, refund windows and dispute SLAs will be published. Until then, coordination is handled manually.
Landing.assurance2Body: If the first pick is unavailable or not a fit, we can suggest alternatives in a similar budget range.
Landing.assurance3Body: Onboarding requires academic proof. Approved tutors show a verified badge to reduce decision risk for families.

Faq.title: FAQ
Faq.subtitle: Split by students and tutors; final policies will ship on standalone pages.
Faq.parent1q: How soon will someone contact me after I submit my request?
Faq.parent1a: The platform aims to match you with tutors within 24 hours. During peak periods or complex requests, there may be slight delays, and we will proactively share the expected timing in messages.
Faq.parent2q: Do I need to choose a tutor on the platform first?
Faq.parent2a: No. You may submit your request only and receive recommendations by grade, subject, and budget, or browse the tutor directory and book directly.
Faq.parent3q: What should I do after a lesson is completed?
Faq.parent3a: After each lesson, please leave an authentic review for the tutor. Your feedback helps other parents choose better and also helps tutors improve their platform ranking and visibility.
Faq.parent4q: Will my personal information be made public?
Faq.parent4a: No. Your phone and request information are used only for platform matching and contact, and will never be publicly displayed. Please refer to the platform privacy policy for details.
Faq.tutor1q: How soon can I get the Verified badge after joining?
Faq.tutor1a: After submitting complete profile information and supporting documents, your account enters review. The Verified badge appears once approved, and timing depends on submission completeness.
Faq.tutor2q: Does the platform charge commission or service fees?
Faq.tutor2a: The platform currently focuses on helping tutors acquire students and get matched for free, with no commission or service fees. If pricing changes in the future, we will announce in advance and collect tutor feedback.
Faq.tutor3q: How can I improve my ranking on the platform?
Faq.tutor3a: Getting more authentic student reviews, teaching on schedule, and maintaining a high reply rate are the most effective ways to improve ranking. The platform sorts based on rating score, lesson completion rate, and activity.
Faq.tutor4q: Can parents see my verification documents?
Faq.tutor4a: No. All verification documents are stored in private encrypted storage and are accessible only to you and platform reviewers. Parents can only see your public profile information.

Directory.title: Tutor directory
Directory.subtitle: Filter tutors and jump straight into booking.
Directory.empty: No tutors match these filters. Try broadening your search.
Directory.subjectsHint: Tap one or more subjects (matches tutors who teach any of them).
